Apr 26 cohort · 676 plans
▼ 0.6pp vs Mar
Mar: 12.2% · cohort view
⚠ Data notes: Margin & deposit totals are in native booking currencies (AUD, USD, GBP, CAD) — not FX-converted. Stripe TTV & refund data covers Dec 2025 – Jun 2026 (see Stripe Data tab). Cancellations lag ~4–6 weeks — Feb 26 shown as latest stable (Mar/Apr/May/Jun still settling). Arrears shown by payment plan creation month (cohort view). SP margin data starts Oct 2025 (prior months showed inconsistent recording).
AUD Exchange Rates
AUD/USD Monthly Average
May 25 – Jun 26 · RBA daily rates averaged · 0.644 → 0.703
AUD vs All Entity Currencies
AUD/USD, AUD/GBP, AUD/CAD · AUD strengthened ~10% vs USD since May 25

Total Deposits Collected (local currency)
PLT entities · AUD equivalent (RBA monthly FX)
Avg Deposit Rate % by Entity
May 2025 – Apr 2026 · PLT_USD highest (~21–23%), PLT_GBP lowest (~12–16%)
Deposit : Instalment Ratio — Overall
Deposit ÷ single instalment amount · ratio of 2.0 = deposit covers 2 instalments
Deposit : Instalment Ratio by Entity
May 2025 – Jun 2026 · PLT_AUD & PLT_USD trending up to ~2.0–2.3×
Refundable vs Non-Refundable (PLT)
Booking Mix — Refundable vs Non-Refundable
May 25 – Jun 26 · % of bookings with known refundability
Booking Count — Refundable vs Non-Refundable
May 25 – Jun 26 · raw counts
Avg Deposit Rate % by Refundability
Non-refundable bookings carry significantly higher deposit rates
Avg Contract Tenor by Refundability (weeks)
Refundable bookings have longer tenors
Avg Gross Margin % by Refundability
Non-refundable bookings carry slightly higher margin
Gross Margin Amount by Refundability (AUD)
Native currency · non-refundable dominates by volume
Contract Tenor
Avg Contract Tenor — Overall (weeks)
All PLT entities combined · instalments × frequency ÷ 7
Weekly vs Fortnightly Mix
Count of active payment schedules by frequency
Avg Contract Tenor by Entity (weeks)
May 2025 – Apr 2026 · PLT_AUD runs longest (~12–16 wks), PLT_USD shortest (~8–11 wks)
Arrears
Plans in Arrears by Cohort
Plans created that month which are currently overdue
Overdue Amount by Cohort (AUD)
Total overdue balance for plans created that month
View:
Entity classifications: PLT_AUD = Australian bookings · PLT_USD = US bookings · PLT_GBP = UK bookings · PLT_CAD = Canadian bookings · SP_AU/US = SlicePay. Margin, deposits, and tenor data derived from db_payment_schedule + db_product_flight — limited for SP entities. Stripe TTV and refunds shown in AUD equivalent.

Stripe Fees

Jan 26 – Apr 26 · Dec 25 not available · total AUD equivalent
Fees by Entity (AUD)
Stacked · PLT_USD dominates due to volume
Effective Fee Rate % by Entity
Fees ÷ TTV · SP entities pay higher rates than PLT
Fees as % of TTV — Overall
Blended rate across all entities
Fee Breakdown by Component
Fee Components — Stacked (AUD)
Jan–Jun 26 · Interchange is largest cost · Dec 25 not available
Network Fees vs Stripe Fees (AUD)
Network = ICC + scheme fees (net of discounts) · Stripe = volume + per-auth
Interchange by Card Brand (AUD)
Visa dominates ~62% · Mastercard ~27% · Discover ~11%
Rebates / Discounts (AUD)
Negotiated volume rebates applied against network costs
